_comment: Template profile. Copy this file to consultant-profile.json and replace with your own data. consultant-profile.json is gitignored so your real profile never leaves your machine.
name: Jane Example
title: Senior Software Engineer & Cloud Architect
summary: Example summary — replace with a 2–4 sentence pitch covering your experience band, typical roles, industries, and the kinds of outcomes you deliver. This text is consumed verbatim by the matching and application prompts, so be specific but honest.

service_offerings.title: Cloud-native Modernization
service_offerings.description: Example offering — describe a concrete outcome (timeframe + deliverable) so recruiters can anchor on it. Keep under ~2 sentences.

service_offerings.title: Team Enablement & Platform Engineering
service_offerings.description: Another example offering. Focus on the *problem you solve*, not on a list of tools.

focus_areas.title: Backend architecture for scalable web services
focus_areas.description: Designing and implementing service boundaries, API contracts, and data models for systems that must grow 10x without rewrites.

focus_areas.title: Cloud-native delivery on Kubernetes
focus_areas.description: CI/CD pipelines, GitOps, observability and cost-aware operations for product teams already on or moving to Kubernetes.

experiences.project_title: Example modernization project — replace with a real engagement
experiences.description: Short, concrete description. Prefer facts (team size, scope, measurable outcome) over adjectives. Two to four sentences max.
Replace with a real project entry. The matcher uses `technologies` and `domains` heavily, so keep them accurate and consistent with the skills list above.
Older entries can be brief; the matcher still picks up the skills and domains from them.
